note: First bilateral P2P live corridor (Feb 2023); expanded to 19 Indian banks Jul 2025; also supports QR-based P2M via HitPay & Liquid Group; part of Project Nexus (go-live 2026)
First UAE acquirer live for UPI QR (Apr 2022); powers NeoPay POS terminals; PhonePe users can pay at NeoPay terminals (live Mar 2024); core UAE QR infrastructure
MoU Nov 2021; live Jul 2024; 200,000+ POS at 60,000+ UAE merchants incl. Dubai Mall & Mall of the Emirates; merged with Magnati (Oct 2025) to form combined MEA fintech platform
NIPL-Magnati partnership live Jan 2025; QR-based UPI via POS terminals; initial rollout at Dubai Duty Free; merged with Network International Oct 2025 (combined 240,000+ merchants)
Live Feb 2, 2024 at Eiffel Tower; expanded to Galeries Lafayette Haussmann Jul 3, 2024 (ahead of Paris Olympics); covers e-commerce + POS; expanding to more French & European merchants
Live Feb 12, 2024; national QR switch of Sri Lanka; 450,000+ LankaQR merchant touchpoints; PhonePe-LankaPay tie-up added May 2024; regulated by Central Bank of Sri Lanka
Live Feb 12, 2024 (co-launched with Sri Lanka); Mauritius Card & ACH Switch; also enabled RuPay card issuance in Mauritius; bilateral flows active both ways
Live Mar 2024; Nepal's largest non-card payment network; 67,000+ merchants; NPR 1.6B+ processed in first year; 5.6L+ transactions by Mar 2025; rural reach to Dolpa, Bajura
First country; live Jul 13, 2021 via Royal Monetary Authority; BHIM app based QR acceptance; widespread across shops, hotels & tourist sites in Thimphu and Paro
QNB-NIPL deal Jul 2024; NETSTARS powers POS QR solution; live Sep 2025 at Qatar Duty Free (Hamad Airport); expanding across QNB-acquired merchants in retail, hospitality & tourism
Live Mar 22, 2025 for Indian tourists; 12,000+ merchants across restaurants, shops & tourist destinations; enables UPI QR acceptance on top of PayNow infrastructure
NIPL-PayNet MoU signed Feb 12-13, 2026; Phase 1: Indians pay at 2.9M+ DuitNow QR touchpoints; Phase 2: Malaysians scan UPI QR in India; aligned with Visit Malaysia 2026
Bilateral pilot active 2025; Project Nexus founding member (signed Jun 30, 2024); full UPI-PromptPay interoperability targeted for 2026; PromptPay has 81M+ registrations & 2.1B monthly txns
Project Nexus founding member (Jun 30, 2024); UPI-InstaPay cross-border linkage under implementation; Nexus Scheme Organisation (NSO) incorporated 2025 in Singapore; go-live targeted 2026
UAE's domestic instant payment system (akin to UPI); NIPL in active discussions to link UPI with Aani for P2P; MoU intent confirmed late 2024; full bilateral link pending regulatory sign-off
Multi-currency cross-border payment platform for Arab nations; NIPL MoU 2024; enables multi-currency UPI transactions across GCC countries; bilateral settlement framework in progress
PPRO-NIPL MoU Nov 17, 2021; limited live for NRI UPI via UK mobile numbers (Apr 2023); merchant QR acceptance patchy; deeper integration still under discussion
Malaysia's first UPI partner (2021); live for inward remittances to India via UPI rails; predates PayNet bilateral agreement; serves Malaysian Indian diaspora remittance corridor

PayNow partner enabling UPI QR acceptance across Singapore merchants; also signed to extend QR UPI across 10 SEA countries incl. Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines, Vietnam, Cambodia, South Korea, Japan, Taiwan, HK
PayPal World launched Jul 23, 2025; UPI is a launch partner alongside Tenpay Global, Venmo & Mercado Pago; enables UPI users to pay at PayPal-accepting merchants globally; covers ~2B users at go-live

Founding members: India (UPI), Singapore (PayNow/FAST), Malaysia (DuitNow), Thailand (PromptPay), Philippines (InstaPay); Indonesia observer; NSO incorporated Singapore 2025; full go-live targeted 2026; hub-and-spoke model for 60-second cross-border payments
